summary: Separate graph.db: added getGraphDb/graphQuery/graphQueryAll/graphQueryOne/graphTransaction to db.js; split migration 72 into content ALTER TABLEs + graphMigrations[1] for all graph pipeline tables in graph.db; updated runner.js with runGraphMigrations; routed graph-extractor/validator/resolver/promoter + entity-cost-tracker + graph-db.js to graphQuery for graph pipeline tables; added startup model logging to all four workers; created scripts/migrate-graph-tables.js one-shot data migration
